name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Layer Bars
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Peanut butter sandwich cookie crumbs (about 20 cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and butter in a small bowl.
2. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a greased 13 x 9 inch baking pan.
3. Layer peanuts, morsels, and coconut over the crumb mixture.
4. Drizzle sweetened condensed milk evenly over top.
5. Bake in a preheated 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the coconut is golden brown.
6. Cool completely on a wire rack.
